OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Antoinette Young, Clerks K. Shaw/M. Olopernes-Pena, Reporter Susan Lee. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Nasir Patel is present, In Propria Persona.

Defendant Scott A. Christian is present.
Andrew Catterall representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case has settled, terms of agreement placed on the record and stipulation filed with the clerk (see scanned document). The trial date is off calendar.
